ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., DEF, MID, FWD) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the player in the fantasy league */,
  "selected" INTEGER /* Number of times the player is selected in user teams */,
  "transfers_in" INTEGER /* Number of transfers in for the player */,
  "transfers_out" INTEGER /* Number of transfers out for the player */,
  "transfers_balance" INTEGER /* Net transfers for the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points earned by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "ict_index" REAL /* ICT index of the player */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Creativity score of the player */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence score of the player */,
  "threat" REAL /* Threat score of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player */,
  "form" TEXT /* Current form of the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the player's data */,
  "transfer_value" INTEGER /* Transfer value of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the player's contract with the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_report" TEXT /* Summary or report of the match */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the match data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "gw" INTEGER /* Gameweek number */,
  "xP" REAL /* Expected points for the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* Bonus points earned by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the player */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals scored by the player */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the player */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the match */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player */,
  "target_output" INTEGER /* Target output for the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won */,
  "aerials_won" INTEGER /* Number of aerial duels won */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred leagues, notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "team_value" INTEGER /* Total value of the team */,
  "points_this_gw" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the current gameweek */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is the captain of the fantasy team */,
  "vice_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is the vice-captain of the fantasy team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the fantasy team data */,
  "budget_remaining" INTEGER /* Remaining budget for the fantasy team */,
  "transfers_made" INTEGER /* Number of transfers made by the user in the current gameweek */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_vice_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("vice_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "gw_joined" INTEGER /* Gameweek when the player joined the team */,
  "gw_left" INTEGER /* Gameweek when the player left the team (NULL if still in the team) */,
  "position_in_team" TEXT /* Position of the player in the fantasy team */,
  "is_captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is the captain of the fantasy team */,
  "is_vice_captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is the vice-captain of the fantasy team */,
  "is_substitute" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is a substitute in the fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_matchcomments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the comment is about */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been reported for inappropriate content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_matchcomments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_matchcomments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the rating is for */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the rating has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the rating has received */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been reported for inappropriate content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
